# infomaniak_public_clouds (Data Source)

Lists all Public Cloud products owned by the given account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "infomaniak_public_clouds" "all" {}

output "cloud_ids" {
  value = [for c in data.infomaniak_public_clouds.all.public_clouds : c.id]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_id` (Number) Infomaniak account identifier. Discover it with `curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $INFOMANIAK_TOKEN" https://api.infomaniak.com/2/profile | jq '.data.preferences.account.current_account_id'`.

### Read-Only

- `public_clouds` (Attributes List) List of Public Cloud products. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--public_clouds))

<a id="nestedatt--public_clouds"></a>
### Nested Schema for `public_clouds`

Read-Only:

- `account_id` (Number) Account identifier.
- `bill_reference` (String) Billing reference.
- `created_at` (Number) Creation timestamp (Unix seconds).
- `customer_name` (String) Customer-defined name.
- `description` (String) Free-form description.
- `expired_at` (Number) Expiration timestamp (Unix seconds).
- `has_maintenance` (Boolean) Maintenance flag.
- `has_operation_in_progress` (Boolean) Operation-in-progress flag.
- `id` (Number) Public Cloud product identifier.
- `internal_name` (String) Internal Infomaniak identifier.
- `is_free` (Boolean) Free tier flag.
- `is_locked` (Boolean) Locked flag.
- `is_trial` (Boolean) Trial flag.
- `is_zero_price` (Boolean) Zero price flag.
- `service_id` (Number) Service identifier.
- `service_name` (String) Service name.
